name: @aily-project/lib-seeed-ir
description: Seeed_Arduino_IR Blockly库，支持 Wio Terminal 内置红外发射、IRLib2 协议发送、Raw发送和基础接收解码。
description_zh_cn: Seeed_Arduino_IR Blockly库，支持 Wio Terminal 内置红外发射、IRLib2 协议发送、Raw发送和基础接收解码。
description_en: Blockly wrapper for Seeed_Arduino_IR with Wio Terminal built-in IR sending, IRLib2 protocol sending, raw sending, and basic receive decoding.
author: Hongtai.liu / Chris Young
